verse_text: while Annas and Caiaphas were high priests, the word of God came to John the son of Zacharias in the wilderness.

links.context: Annas was the previous high priest and remained a force of power behind the religious establishment (see note at [[LUK.3:2]]). Caiaphas was high priest the year of Jesus' Crucifixion, holding the office from AD 18-36.

Amos preached repentance during a time of spiritual drought that preceded judgment ([[LUK.3:1]], [[LUK.3:2]]); indeed, Christ's Advent was an earthquake that shook the world ([[MAT.28:2]]), and the coming of the Holy Spirit a judgment by fire (vv. 4, 7, 10, 12, 14; 2:2, 5).
